summary: A solid audience tape that captures a strong second set often hailed as one of the best ’90s Dew performances.
review: Both reviewers praise this recording for its energetic second set, calling it possibly the finest Dew-era show of the 1990s. The audience source is described as “not a bad aud,” indicating decent clarity for a crowd tape. Overall the performance and listening experience are highly regarded.

ai_rating.rationale: Show quality is rated very high (strong second set, “stellar” Dew), while the audience recording is considered decent but not exceptional; combined weighted score yields ~4.3.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewers note the tape is an audience ("aud") recording and describe it as “not a bad” – clear enough for enjoyment but without claims of superb fidelity.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Second set highlighted as the peak of the concert, with reviewers calling it one of the best Dew-era shows of the ’90s.
